name: ESP_ERR_EFUSE
comment: Base error code for efuse api.

name: ESP_OK_EFUSE_CNT
comment: OK the required number of bits is set.

name: ESP_ERR_EFUSE_REPEATED_PROG
comment: Error repeated programming of programmed bits is strictly forbidden.

name: ESP_ERR_NOT_ENOUGH_UNUSED_KEY_BLOCKS
comment: Error not enough unused key blocks available

name: ESP_ERR_DAMAGED_READING
comment: Error. Burn or reset was done during a reading operation leads to damage read data. This error is internal to the efuse component and not returned by any public API.
